business_justification: GCE host runs critical batch processing workloads. Patching requires full workload migration which requires 6-hour maintenance window. Migration scheduling constrained by end-of-quarter processing freeze. Next available window: January 18, 2026.
compensating_controls: 1. vCenter access restricted to management VLAN with MFA-enforced jump box access only. 2. Guest VM isolation enabled via VMware Tools hardened settings. 3. CrowdStrike Falcon deployed on all guest VMs with real-time behavioral detection. 4. Network IDS signatures for CVE-2025-22225 exploitation deployed on fw-edge-02 (Palo Alto Threat Prevention). 5. Automated snapshot backups every 4 hours for rapid recovery.
review_notes: Compensating controls verified operational as of last check. Remediation window confirmed for January 18. All IDS signatures active — 0 matched events.

business_justification: Legacy billing application uses Struts 2.3.x. Full framework upgrade requires application rewrite estimated at 4 months. Application retirement approved for Q2 2026 as part of platform modernization initiative.
compensating_controls: 1. Application not internet-facing — accessible only from internal network via VPN. 2. WAF rules (ModSecurity) blocking known Struts exploitation patterns. 3. Application service account has read-only database permissions. 4. Enhanced logging and monitoring via Splunk for suspicious request patterns.
review_notes: Q4 revalidation completed November 15. All controls verified operational. Platform modernization project on track — billing module migration started.

business_justification: D-Link NAS used for non-critical development file storage. Vendor has not released a patch and has marked the product as end-of-life. Replacement approved in Q1 2026 hardware budget.
compensating_controls: 1. Device on isolated VLAN with no internet access. 2. Firewall ACL restricts access to 5 development team members. 3. No production data or PII stored. 4. Weekly backups to GCS bucket.
review_notes: Revalidation completed December 22. Controls verified. Replacement Synology ordered — expected delivery February 2026.
